title: Rabat, Rabat-Salé-Kénitra — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Rabat is a city in Rabat-Salé-Kénitra with a population of 577,000. The capital city of Morocco, blending historic landmarks with modern governance, featuring beautiful gardens and a relaxed coastal atmosphere.
